violations.text: Food debris was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC cleaned out food debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the back area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

An employee was observed re-making the same smoothie that had been consumed and returned. After being served or sold and in the possession of a CONSUMER, FOOD that is unused or returned by the CONSUMER may not be offered as FOOD for human consumption. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Thermometers are lacking in multiple refrigeration units. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2023
